title: astragalus onobrychis var. stenophyllus
intro: Astragalus onobrychis var. stenophyllus, also known as the Astragalus onobrychis subsp. stenophyllus or Four-veined milk vetch, is a plant species within the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to enhance immune function, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus onobrychis var. stenophyllus is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall health and well-being.
